hero.subtitle: Process automation, AI implementation, and functional websites for companies that want results, not promises.

aboutFraviz.title:
AI consulting firm
for real results.
aboutFraviz.p1: Fraviz is an AI consulting firm from Croatia. It was born from real-world experience — after years of working in business consulting and data analysis in the tourism industry, it became clear how much time and money companies waste on processes that can be automated.
aboutFraviz.p2: That insight led to the first project: an automated lead generation system that collected 1,000+ contacts in a few hours and generated over €10,000 in revenue. Since then, Fraviz helps small and medium businesses implement AI into their daily operations — concrete, measurable, no theory.
aboutFraviz.p3: Behind Fraviz is experience in business consulting, market analysis, and 1-2 years of intensive work with AI tools. The focus isn't on technology for technology's sake — but on results measured in euros and hours saved.
aboutFraviz.milestone2: Discovering the potential of AI automation
aboutFraviz.milestone3: Founding Fraviz — AI implementation for SMBs

about.title: What Fraviz brings to your business?
about.headline: Automation that generates revenue while you plan your next move.
about.p1: Fraviz combines AI, automation, and modern tools into systems that work for you — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. From email processing to data extraction, from web development to business optimization.
about.p2: Every delivered system comes with measurable results. No charge for advice — results are what count.

items.title: AI Consultation & Optimization
items.description: Business analysis and identification of where AI can save time and money. Concrete recommendations with measurable ROI, not theory.

items.title: Business Process Automation
items.description: Automation of repetitive business processes — from email handling to reporting. Systems that work 24/7 without intervention.

items.title: Web Scraping & Data Extraction
items.description: Need 1,000 emails, tax IDs, or contacts? Done in an hour. Legal, clean, structured.

items.title: Websites
items.description: Functional, fast websites — without the traditional development process. From idea to live version in days, not weeks.

items.title: AI Strategy & Prompt Engineering
items.description: How to use ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI tools to actually work for you. Training, strategy, implementation.

items.title: No-Code Automation & Integrations
items.description: Connecting existing tools (Gmail, Sheets, CRM) into automated workflows. No coding required, with measurable results.

projects.title: C24 Gym
projects.description: Complete website for a fitness studio — from design to launch in a few days. Includes pricing packages, training calendar, and contact form.

items.name: Bepo Stojanov
items.text: The website was ready in just a few days. Professional, fast, and hassle-free.

items.name: Duje Čudina
items.text: We needed a modern website for the gym and got exactly that — clean, functional, and fast.

items.name: Robert Orlović
items.text: Great collaboration. The website is professional and clients respond to it positively.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code to work with Fraviz?
items.a: No. All systems are delivered ready to use. Only basic digital literacy is needed — email, Google Sheets, and similar tools.

items.q: How long does a typical project take?
items.a: It depends on complexity. Website: 3-7 days. Process automation: 1-3 weeks. AI consultation: arranged as needed.
Claude Code, Claude AI, Antigravity, Manus, Apify, Next.js — and whatever the project requires. The tool is chosen for the problem, not the other way around.
Each project is priced individually based on complexity and expected ROI. The free introductory call is exactly for this assessment — no obligation.

items.q: Does Fraviz only work with companies from Croatia?
items.a: The focus is on the Croatian market, but collaboration is possible with companies from across the region and the EU.

items.q: What if I'm not sure what I need?
items.a: That's exactly what the free introductory call is for. Situation analysis, problem identification, and a concrete recommendation — no obligation.

contact.title: Have a problem? Let's solve it.
